title: Impossible travel followed by suspicious cloud API activity
description: Identity telemetry indicates password spraying, impossible travel, and suspicious cloud token activity for maria.chen.
recommended_objective: Determine whether this is account takeover, identify affected assets, and produce response actions.

title: Encoded PowerShell with suspicious outbound transfer
description: EDR and proxy telemetry show encoded PowerShell followed by file sharing upload from the same host.
recommended_objective: Validate endpoint compromise and determine whether data left the environment.

title: Password spray against finance and engineering users
description: Repeated failed authentication attempts targeted multiple users from the same source IP.
recommended_objective: Confirm spray scope and identify any successful follow-on authentication.
